LightningComponentBundle.description: Modern LWC component for managing file uploads based on custom metadata configuration

property.name: configuredObjectApiName
property.label: Object API Name
property.description: Optional: Specify the object API name to retrieve metadata. If not provided, it will be derived from the recordId.

property.name: customLabel
property.label: Custom Label
property.description: Optional: Custom label to display in the header. Use this to differentiate between multiple components on the same page.

property.name: filterField
property.label: Filter Field API Name
property.description: API Name of the field on the current record used to filter files (e.g., LegalForm__c)

property.name: filter
property.label: Filter Value
property.description: Optional: Static value to filter files (e.g. 'directly')

property.name: recordTypeField
property.label: Record Type Field API Name
property.description: Optional: Deprecated - Logic is now automatic in Apex.

property.name: displayMode
property.label: Display Mode
property.description: Choose how to display the component (RecordPage or Modal)

property.name: openByDefault
property.label: Open By Default
property.description: Should the accordion be open by default?

property.name: configuredObjectApiName
property.label: Object API Name
property.description: Optional: Specify the object API name to retrieve metadata. If not provided, it will be derived from the recordId.

property.name: customLabel
property.label: Custom Label
property.description: Optional: Custom label to display in the header. Use this to differentiate between multiple components on the same page.

property.name: filterField
property.label: Filter Field API Name
property.description: API Name of the field on the current record used to filter files (e.g., LegalForm__c)

property.name: filter
property.label: Filter Value
property.description: Optional: Static value to filter files (e.g. 'directly')

property.name: recordTypeField
property.label: Record Type Field API Name
property.description: Optional: Deprecated - Logic is now automatic in Apex.

property.name: displayMode
property.label: Display Mode
property.description: Choose how to display the component (RecordPage or Modal)

property.name: openByDefault
property.label: Open By Default
property.description: Should the accordion be open by default?
